title: Default Action
text: Default Action Default action when the selected object is dragged and dropped. Valid values are Copy , Move , or Create Shortcut . When the pop-up menu is displayed during a drag and drop action, the default action is shown in bold. Value Description Copy Copy the selected object Move Move the selected object Create Shortcut Create a shortcut to the selected object Applies To Drag-and-Drop Formats Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
